title: Crispy!
description: We added more cookies, 'cause you can never be crispy enough!
body:
## **ABOUT** ![Crispy Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8c17f36862496efefebe1b87bb8dc264e8080e6.png) ![Choco Chip Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/026ab7a743e25659a59d6ed19627017e68db38da.png)
Crispy is a mod that remakes minecraft's cookies, and gives you lots of new cookie types, with various types and recipes to pick from!
![Fortune Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/646f055eafff46ff7df05fae7dc72829d980df5c.png) ## FEAUTRES **Foodstuffs:** - Plain Cookie - Chocolate Cookie [Gives Sugar rush effect] - Chocolate Chip Cookie [Replaces Minecraft's default Cookie] - White Chocolate Cookie [Gives Sugar rush effect] - White Chocolate Chip Cookie - Raisin Cookie - Sprinkled Cookie [Gives Sugar Rush effect] - Ore-o [Gives Sugar Rush effect] - Copper Ore-o [Gives Speed Boost] - Iron Ore-o [Gives Resistence] - Gold Oreo-o [Gives Haste] - Diamond Ore-o [Gives Strength] - Fortune Cookie [Gives you a random message and Luck 2] - Red Velvet Cookie [Gives Sugar rush effect] - Glow Berry Cookie [Gives Glowing effect] - Date Cookie - Kahk [Gives Sugar rush 2 effect] - Peanut Butter Cookie [Gives Sugar rush effect] - Jam Cookie [Gives Sugar rush effect] - Honey Covered Cookie  - Plain Cookie With A Spider Eye On Top Of It [Gives Poison effect] - Gingerbread Man Cookie  - Gingerbread Man - Heart Shaped Cookie - Chocolate Heart Cookie [Gives Sugar rush effect] - White Chocolate Heart Cookie [Gives Sugar rush effect] - Heart Cookie [Gives Sugar rush 2 effect] - Star Shaped Cookie - Chocolate Star Cookie [Gives Sugar rush effect] - White Chocolate Star Cookie [Gives Sugar rush effect] - Honey Covered Star Cookie **Doughs:** - Cookie Dough - Chocolate Cookie Dough - White Chocolate Cookie Dough - White Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough - Raisin Cookie Dough - Red Velvet Cookie Dough - Glow Berry Cookie Dough - Date Cookie Dough - Peanut Butter Cookie Dough - Jam Cookie Dough - Gingerbread Man Cookie Dough - Heart Cookie Dough - Chocolate Heart Cookie Dough - White Chocolate Heart Cookie Dough - Star Cookie Dough - Chocolate Star Cookie Dough - White Chocolate Star Cookie Dough - Cinnamon Roll Dough **Other Additions:** - Grapes [Obtained from breaking vines] - Raisins - Date [Obtained from breaking acacia leaves] - Peanuts [Obtained from peanut crop or village chests] - Peanut Butter - Sweet Berry Jam - PB&J Sandwich - Cinnamon [Obtained from stripping jungle logs] - Cinnamon Roll - Sugar Glazed Cinnamon Roll **Achievements:** - "Is this thing even Edible?" - Make an Ore-o using cocoa and a raw ore. - "The Fortunate Son" - Eat a fortune cookie and get a random message. - "Wanna be My Valentine?" - Heart cookie with a heart shaped plain cookie and sweet berry jam. - "Squid Games." - Make a honey covered star cookie. ![Choco Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efb51fcf97d96314585059870750bda7fb2c19f3.png) ## **CREDITS** ItsHamza - Programming YaBoiBruno - Art ![White Choco Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d23eb08cb2a27c3d2f77266e9c0719baebd6eee.png) [![Also On Curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfbfcf2cb7a56d6a9a26fb592f6ce1ae040b2570.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crispy)
